steps.title: Find the clause boundary
steps.content: The words before the blank complete a list: race, gender, history, and memory. The words after the blank form a second independent clause: she is credited with expanding the horizons of conceptual photographic art. A comma plus a coordinating conjunction is needed between the clauses.

steps.title: Test the connector choices
steps.content: Choice A has the conjunction but lacks the comma needed before it. Choice C leaves the two clauses with no punctuation or conjunction. Choice D uses a comma alone, creating a comma splice. The answer is B.
